RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration, Clinic A Pilot
PC: T. Adeyemi | 2026-04-15

RISKS
R1 | Vendor v2 deprecation in 90 days
    Trigger: Vendor announcement 2026-03-28
    Impact: High
    Likelihood: High
    Owner: Lead engineer (currently on leave) / backup engineer
    Mitigation: Plan migration spike post-leave; will scope vendor PS option.

R2 | Scope creep — 3 endpoints added since kickoff plus PO ask for clinics B+C
    Impact: High
    Likelihood: Medium
    Owner: PO
    Mitigation: Bring stabilization data to next steering; recommend deferral.

R3 | Engineer on paternity leave (4 weeks)
    Impact: Medium
    Likelihood: Certain
    Owner: Eng manager
    Mitigation: Cross-train backup; on-call rotation active.

R4 | HL7 lab feed instability
    Impact: Medium
    Likelihood: High
    Owner: IT Ops
    Mitigation: Investigating; auto-retry deployed; vendor call scheduled.

ISSUES
I1 | New integration endpoints added mid-build (testing not yet planned)
    Owner: PC + QA
    Action: QA scope by 2026-04-22.

ASSUMPTIONS
A1 | Vendor PS engagement will hit timeline.
    Owner: PC.

DEPENDENCIES
D1 | Vendor for migration support
    Owner: Vendor SM
    Note: Weekly status sync.

D2 | Internal IT for cutover weekend
    Owner: IT Ops
    Note: Runbook review pre-cutover.

(End of document. Single snapshot — no prior versions.)
